requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — NTE INEN / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——NTE INEN / IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——NTE INEN / IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Ecuadorian market are assessed for safety primarily against IEC 62133-2 as adopted into the Ecuadorian standards system through NTE INEN national standards. Where the product falls within the scope of an applicable RTE (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano), conformity is demonstrated by safety testing to the referenced NTE INEN / IEC 62133 standard and documented in the Certificate of Conformity file. The standard covers abuse testing such as overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse and forced discharge. Ecuador does not operate an EU-style horizontal Battery Regulation; battery safety duties flow from the applicable RTE plus the INEN Certificate of Conformity mechanism rather than from a single dedicated battery law.
summary.zh: 投放厄瓜多尔市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，主要依据通过NTE INEN国家标准转化的IEC 62133-2进行安全评估。若产品落入适用的RTE（厄瓜多尔技术法规）范围，则须通过所引用的NTE INEN/IEC 62133标准安全测试来证明符合性，并归入合格证书文件。该标准涵盖过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及强制放电等滥用测试。厄瓜多尔不设欧盟式横向电池法规；电池安全义务来自适用的RTE加上INEN合格证书机制，而非单一专门的电池法律。
summary.zht: 投放厄瓜多爾市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，主要依據通過NTE INEN國家標準轉化的IEC 62133-2進行安全評估。若產品落入適用的RTE（厄瓜多爾技術法規）範圍，則須通過所引用的NTE INEN/IEC 62133標準安全測試來證明符合性，並歸入合格證書文件。該標準涵蓋過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電等濫用測試。厄瓜多爾不設歐盟式橫向電池法規；電池安全義務來自適用的RTE加上INEN合格證書機制，而非單一專門的電池法律。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems (as adopted via NTE INEN national standards)
Applicable RTE INEN (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) where the product is in scope
INEN Certificate of Conformity mechanism (INEN-1 / recognized conformity assessment body)

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), supplemented by GB 18287-2013 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report issued by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is not, by itself, recognized as the Ecuadorian Certificate of Conformity and does not discharge the applicable RTE obligation.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），并以GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池）补充。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告本身不被认可为厄瓜多尔合格证书，亦不能免除适用的RTE义务。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），並以GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池）補充。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告本身不被認可為厄瓜多爾合格證書，亦不能免除適用的RTE義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because Ecuador relies on IEC 62133 as adopted through NTE INEN rather than on the Chinese national standard, exporters should build evidence aligned to IEC 62133-2 and to the specific NTE INEN edition referenced by the applicable RTE. Key gaps: (1) test severity differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 in crush and overcharge; (2) the Ecuadorian route requires a Certificate of Conformity in the importer file, not merely a test report; (3) a Chinese-language GB report typically requires Spanish documentation and recognition by an INEN-accepted body before it supports the Certificate of Conformity.
gap.zh: 由于厄瓜多尔依据通过NTE INEN转化的IEC 62133，而非中国国家标准，出口商应围绕IEC 62133-2及适用RTE所引用的具体NTE INEN版本建立证据。主要差距：（1）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在挤压和过充测试的严苛程度上存在差异；（2）厄瓜多尔路径要求进口商文件中具备合格证书，而非仅有测试报告；（3）中文GB报告通常需提供西班牙文文件并经INEN认可机构承认后，才能支持合格证书。
gap.zht: 由於厄瓜多爾依據通過NTE INEN轉化的IEC 62133，而非中國國家標準，出口商應圍繞IEC 62133-2及適用RTE所引用的具體NTE INEN版本建立證據。主要差距：（1）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在擠壓和過充測試的嚴苛程度上存在差異；（2）厄瓜多爾路徑要求進口商文件中具備合格證書，而非僅有測試報告；（3）中文GB報告通常需提供西班牙文文件並經INEN認可機構承認後，才能支持合格證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — when an applicable RTE covers the product, IEC 62133 / NTE INEN safety testing supporting an INEN Certificate of Conformity is required before market placement in Ecuador
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuadorian market placement of in-scope lithium batteries requires safety evidence to IEC 62133 as adopted via NTE INEN, channelled into an INEN Certificate of Conformity rather than into a Chinese GB report. GB 31241 testing may support engineering analysis but does not by itself satisfy the Ecuadorian Certificate of Conformity, so exporters should prepare IEC 62133-aligned testing and Spanish-language documentation recognized by an INEN-accepted body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在范围内的锂电池进入厄瓜多尔市场，须提供依据通过NTE INEN转化的IEC 62133的安全证据，并归入INEN合格证书，而非中国GB报告。GB 31241测试可支持工程分析，但本身不能满足厄瓜多尔合格证书要求，因此出口商应准备与IEC 62133一致的测试及经INEN认可机构承认的西班牙文文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在範圍內的鋰電池進入厄瓜多爾市場，須提供依據通過NTE INEN轉化的IEC 62133的安全證據，並歸入INEN合格證書，而非中國GB報告。GB 31241測試可支持工程分析，但本身不能滿足厄瓜多爾合格證書要求，因此出口商應準備與IEC 62133一致的測試及經INEN認可機構承認的西班牙文文件。
